Stop the spiral.
Redirect in one click.

The Spiral Interrupt Engine watches your AI-assisted work in real time. When it detects a loop, it surfaces the 5 best repos to pivot to and lets you approve the redirect without breaking flow.

From $99/mo - White label available

html:
🌀

Spiral Interrupt Engine

Workflow - AI Augmentation - RDTI

Detects when your AI-assisted workflow is looping. Surfaces the 5 best escape repos. One click to redirect and retrofit.

🧩 Widget 🌐 Extension 📱 App 🔔 Push
IP: SPIRAL-001 | White label available | RDTI eligible
title: Spiral Interrupt Engine - Synal Widget Card
description: Synal widget catalogue entry. Shows in extension widget browser. white_label ready.

html:
<script type="application/json" id="synal-spiral-manifest">{
  "slug": "spiral_interrupt_engine",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "category": "workflow",
  "title": "Spiral Interrupt Engine",
  "description": "Detects recursive AI-workflow loops and surfaces the best escape path.",
  "icon": "spiral",
  "channels": [
    "widget",
    "extension",
    "app",
    "push"
  ],
  "trigger": {
    "type": "api",
    "endpoint": "https://m5oqj21chd.execute-api.ap-southeast-2.amazonaws.com/lambda/invoke",
    "fn": "spiral-app-detect-spiral",
    "auth": "bridge_api_key"
  },
  "callback_endpoint": "https://ciajr8kl34.execute-api.ap-southeast-2.amazonaws.com/Prod/callback/choice",
  "callback_auth": "hmac_sha256",
  "sfn_arn": "arn:aws:states:ap-southeast-2:140548542136:stateMachine:SpiralApp-Orchestrator",
  "supabase_tables": [
    "workflow_execution",
    "workflow_repo_candidates",
    "workflow_decision_log"
  ],
  "ip_register_code": "SPIRAL-001",
  "rdti_eligible": true,
  "white_label": true,
  "tenant_config": {
    "GITHUB_OWNER": "required",
    "GITHUB_TOKEN": "required",
    "CALLBACK_SIGNING_SECRET": "auto_generated",
    "MAX_REPO_CANDIDATES": "default:5"
  },
  "pricing": {
    "model": "per_execution",
    "currency": "AUD",
    "unit_price": 0.05,
    "minimum_monthly": 99,
    "white_label_setup": 2500
  }
}</script>

html:
<script>async function runTask(taskId){return fetch('/api/v1/synal/task-run',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({task_id:taskId})})}
async function autoExecute(taskId){return fetch('/api/v1/synal/auto-execute',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({mode:'single',task_id:taskId})})}
async function refreshTaskState(){return fetch('/api/v1/synal/task-refresh',{method:'POST'})}
</script>
title: Synal Task Controls
